skills.name: Patient communications
skills.description: Draft clear, empathetic patient-facing messages (results, prep instructions, follow-ups) with the right tone, key points, and call to action.

skills.name: Appointment reminders
skills.description: Create multi-channel appointment reminder copy and sequences (SMS, email, call script) that reduce no-shows and set clear prep expectations.

skills.name: No-show reduction plan
skills.description: Design a practical no-show reduction playbook: outreach timing, confirmation workflows, waitlist fill rules, and metrics to track.

skills.name: Patient intake forms
skills.description: Improve or draft patient intake forms and questionnaires that capture clinical and administrative data cleanly while staying patient-friendly.

skills.name: Referral process design
skills.description: Map and document the referral workflow end-to-end—ordering, authorization, tracking, and closed-loop communication with referring providers.

skills.name: Care pathway design
skills.description: Build a structured care pathway or clinical pathway outline with stages, decision points, owners, and expected outcomes for a condition or service line.

skills.name: Discharge summary helper
skills.description: Produce a clear discharge summary template or draft covering diagnoses, procedures, meds, follow-up, and patient instructions for handoff continuity.

skills.name: Medication reconciliation note
skills.description: Structure a medication reconciliation note comparing home, inpatient, and discharge meds with discrepancies, rationale, and follow-up actions.

skills.name: Prior authorization packet
skills.description: Assemble a complete prior authorization packet outline: clinical criteria, supporting notes, codes, and payer-ready checklist for faster approvals.

skills.name: Insurance appeal letter
skills.description: Write a professional medical necessity or claim appeal letter with clinical rationale, supporting evidence, and a clear request for reconsideration.

skills.name: Clinical coding query
skills.description: Draft a compliant physician query for coding clarification (specificity, POA, clinical indicators) without leading language.

skills.name: Denial management plan
skills.description: Build a denial management workflow: root-cause categories, appeal priorities, ownership, SLAs, and prevention actions for recurring denials.

skills.name: Patient billing explanation
skills.description: Explain a patient bill or estimate in plain language—charges, insurance adjustments, patient responsibility, and payment options.

skills.name: Eligibility verification note
skills.description: Document insurance eligibility and benefits verification findings: coverage status, copay/deductible, auth requirements, and next steps.

skills.name: HIPAA compliance checklist
skills.description: Produce a practical HIPAA privacy and security checklist for a process, system, or clinic workflow with owners and evidence points.

skills.name: Privacy incident response
skills.description: Outline a healthcare privacy incident response plan: containment, risk assessment, notification triggers, documentation, and corrective actions.

skills.name: Quality measure plan
skills.description: Define or improve a clinical quality measure program: measure definitions, data sources, workflows, targets, and improvement interventions.

skills.name: HCAHPS improvement plan
skills.description: Create an HCAHPS / patient experience improvement plan with domain-level tactics, staff scripts, measurement, and accountability.

skills.name: Clinical staffing plan
skills.description: Build a clinical staffing model or schedule plan covering demand, skill mix, ratios, coverage gaps, and contingency options.

skills.name: Provider credentialing note
skills.description: Document a provider credentialing or privileging status note with required items, gaps, expirations, and follow-up owners.

skills.name: Provider onboarding plan
skills.description: Design a provider onboarding checklist and timeline covering credentialing, EMR access, orientation, and first-clinic readiness.

skills.name: Clinic schedule design
skills.description: Optimize clinic templates and schedules for access, provider utilization, rooming flow, and visit-type mix.

skills.name: OR block time plan
skills.description: Plan OR / procedure block time allocation, utilization rules, release policies, and performance metrics for surgical services.

skills.name: Clinical supply plan
skills.description: Create a clinical supply and par-level plan for a unit or procedure type, including critical items, reorder points, and waste controls.

skills.name: Formulary decision note
skills.description: Draft a formulary review or P&T-style note summarizing efficacy, safety, cost, alternatives, and a recommended status decision.

skills.name: Telehealth visit script
skills.description: Write a telehealth visit script covering tech check, consent, history, counseling, documentation cues, and closing instructions.

skills.name: Triage protocol
skills.description: Design a nurse or call-center triage protocol with acuity levels, red flags, disposition rules, and escalation paths.

skills.name: Clinical escalation pathway
skills.description: Define clinical escalation criteria and communication pathways for deterioration, after-hours issues, and critical results.

skills.name: Infection control note
skills.description: Produce an infection prevention note or checklist for isolation, PPE, outbreak response, or unit-level control measures.

skills.name: Healthcare emergency plan
skills.description: Draft or refine a facility emergency operations plan section covering roles, communication, surge, evacuation, and recovery priorities.

skills.name: EMR workflow design
skills.description: Map or improve an EMR clinical workflow (orders, documentation, in-basket, referrals) to reduce clicks, delays, and documentation burden.

skills.name: Interoperability brief
skills.description: Summarize a health data interoperability need or integration: systems involved, data exchange goals, standards, risks, and recommended approach.

skills.name: Patient portal copy
skills.description: Write patient portal UI copy, notifications, and help text that is clear, accessible, and action-oriented for common self-service tasks.

skills.name: Patient education material
skills.description: Create patient education content on a condition, procedure, or self-care topic in plain language with key takeaways and when-to-call guidance.

skills.name: Plain-language consent
skills.description: Rewrite informed consent or authorization language into plain language while preserving required elements and risks/benefits clarity.

skills.name: Research recruitment plan
skills.description: Design a clinical research recruitment plan: eligibility messaging, channels, screening flow, and ethical recruitment language.

skills.name: IRB submission checklist
skills.description: Build an IRB / ethics submission checklist covering protocol elements, consent, risks, data protection, and required attachments.

skills.name: Clinical trial operations note
skills.description: Document a clinical trial operations note on site readiness, visit schedule, deviations, or coordination needs for study teams.

skills.name: Population health plan
skills.description: Outline a population health initiative for a defined cohort: risk factors, outreach, care gaps, interventions, and outcome metrics.

skills.name: Patient risk stratification
skills.description: Define a risk stratification approach (tiers, criteria, data inputs) and recommended care intensity for each risk level.

skills.name: Value-based care plan
skills.description: Create a value-based care operating plan covering quality metrics, cost drivers, care coordination tactics, and contract alignment.

skills.name: ACO performance report note
skills.description: Summarize ACO or shared-savings performance for a period: quality scores, utilization, financial trends, and recommended actions.

skills.name: Payer contract note
skills.description: Summarize key terms of a payer contract for ops and clinical leaders: rates, quality terms, prior auth rules, and operational impacts.

skills.name: Medical policy summary
skills.description: Distill a payer medical policy into an actionable summary: covered indications, exclusions, documentation requirements, and coding cues.

skills.name: Clinical guideline digest
skills.description: Digest a clinical practice guideline into a concise operational brief for clinicians: key recommendations, changes, and local adoption notes.

skills.name: CME education plan
skills.description: Plan a CME or clinical education series: learning objectives, topics, faculty, schedule, and evaluation methods for a defined period.

skills.name: Healthcare weekly ops brief
skills.description: Produce a weekly healthcare operations brief covering access, quality, staffing, revenue cycle, and top risks with owners and next actions.

skills.name: Healthcare ops playbook
skills.description: Compile a reusable healthcare operations playbook for a service line or clinic: standard processes, roles, SLAs, and escalation paths.

skills.name: Healthcare compliance review
skills.description: Run a focused healthcare compliance review for a process or policy area, listing requirements, gaps, evidence, and remediation steps.

skills.name: Custom healthcare deliverable
skills.description: Produce a custom healthcare operations deliverable tailored to the stated context, goal, audience, and constraints when no specific skill fits.
